vocab.example: I consume a diet rich in antioxidants and vitamins specifically to fortify the immune system against seasonal illnesses.

vocab.meaning: cách tiếp cận sức khỏe toàn diện (cả thân và tâm)
vocab.example: I've adopted a holistic approach to health, recognizing that mental tranquility is just as vital as physical fitness.
Swimming laps twice a week has significantly bolstered my cardiovascular endurance over the past year.

vocab.meaning: kiềm chế sự thèm muốn (đồ ăn/thức uống không tốt)
vocab.example: Drinking a glass of water before meals helps me curb the craving for sugary snacks in the afternoon.

vocab.meaning: ngăn chặn các bệnh mãn tính
vocab.example: Engaging in regular aerobic exercise is a proven way to stave off chronic diseases like hypertension and diabetes.

vocab.meaning: đạt được mức sinh lực/sức sống cao nhất
vocab.example: By prioritizing seven hours of restorative sleep, I am able to attain peak vitality for my demanding workday.
Switching to a plant-based diet has had a profound impact on my energy levels and overall digestion.

vocab.meaning: giảm bớt căng thẳng về mặt sinh lý (cơ bắp/nội tiết)
vocab.example: Yoga is my preferred method to alleviate physiological stress and improve my body's flexibility.
I always scrutinize the nutritional profile of food products to ensure they don't contain hidden trans fats.

vocab.meaning: thói quen ngồi nhiều/ít vận động
vocab.example: I use a standing desk to break my sedentary habits and encourage better posture while I work.
